title: optimax+
description: a client-side modpack that optimizes and adds functionality to minecraft.
body:
## performance improvement
**Sodium and his add-ons, EntityCulling, ImmediatelyFast**

To improve fps, world generation and multiplayer with your friends

**Dynamic FPS, Exordium, FerriteCore**

To improve stability 


## HUD improvement
**Just Enough Items, BetterF3, AppleSkin, Blur (Fabric), Eating Animation, Chat Heads, WTHIT, Xaero's Minimap, World Map**

Adds handy features, animations and visual enhancements to the HUD

## game visual improvement
**3d Skin Layers, Iris Shaders, LambDynamicLights, Entity Texture Features**

To improve the visuals of the game with, shader compatibility and Optifine resources pack compatibility

## Add features
**Simple Voice Chat, MidnightControls, Zoomify, Mouse Tweaks, Shulker Box Tooltip**

Add practical features such as Zoom or voice chat for compatible servers

## 100% customized loading screen and main menu

thanks to the **fancy menu** mod and its addons, optimax+ has 100% customized and embellished menus
